paper_metadata.title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
paper_metadata.abstract: In deep learning, models typically reuse the same parameters for all inputs. Mixture of Experts (MoE) defies this and instead selects different parameters for each incoming example. The result is a sparsely-activated model -- with outrageous numbers of parameters -- but a constant computational cost. However, despite several notable successes of MoE, widespread adoption has been hindered by complexity, communication costs and training instability -- we address these with the Switch Transformer. We simplify the MoE routing algorithm and design intuitive improved models with reduced communication and computational costs. Our proposed training techniques help wrangle the instabilities and we show large sparse models may be trained, for the first time, with lower precision (bfloat16) formats. We design models based off T5-Base and T5-Large to obtain up to 7x increases in pre-training speed with the same computational resources. These improvements extend into multilingual settings where we measure gains over the mT5-Base version across all 101 languages. Finally, we advance the current scale of language models by pre-training up to trillion parameter models on the "Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus" and achieve a 4x speedup over the T5-XXL model.

extraction_data.innovation: Switch Transformers introduce a sparsely activated mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture that routes tokens to a single expert, simplifying routing computation and improving scalability while maintaining model quality. This enables efficient scaling to trillion-parameter models with constant FLOPs per example.
extraction_data.extension: The router mechanism uses a top-1 gating strategy with auxiliary load balancing loss to ensure efficient token routing across experts, reducing computational overhead compared to dense models.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling neural language models efficiently to trillion-parameter sizes while maintaining computational efficiency
extraction_data.application: Multilingual language modeling, fine-tuning for specific tasks, multi-task training
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.parameters: FLOP-MATCHED TO T5-LARGE (739M DENSE PARAMETERS, SCALED WITH EXPERTS), 1.1B, 2.0B, 3.8B, 7.4B, 14.7B, 26B, 395B
extraction_data.innovation: Introduction of sparse expert routing in Transformer models, enabling efficient scaling to trillion-parameter models by activating only a subset of experts per input token, significantly improving model capacity without proportional increases in computational cost.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Improved C4 corpus (removes intra-example text duplication)
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on tasks like SuperGLUE, SQuAD, Winogrande, XSum, ANLI, ARC, and closed-book QA
extraction_data.extension: Simplified single-expert routing with auxiliary load balancing loss to encourage uniform token distribution across experts, and selective precision casting to float32 for router inputs to improve training stability.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models efficiently with sparse computation to improve performance without proportional increases in computational cost.
extraction_data.application: Language modeling, fine-tuning for reasoning and knowledge-based tasks (e.g., SQuAD, SuperGLUE, ANLI, Natural Questions, WebQuestions, TriviaQA)
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: An upscaled variant of Switch-Base designed to match the training speed of MoE models while outperforming both MoE and dense models on a per-step basis.
extraction_data.application: Language modeling, pre-training for downstream NLP tasks
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models efficiently with sparse expert architectures
extraction_data.extension: Increased model hidden-size from 768 to 896 and number of heads from 14 to 16 to match the speed of MoE models while maintaining single-expert routing efficiency.
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces sparse expert routing to scale Transformer models efficiently by dynamically activating subsets of parameters (experts) per input, enabling trillion-parameter models without proportional compute costs.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Improved C4 corpus (removes intra-example text duplication)
extraction_data.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, summarization, multilingual tasks, and knowledge-intensive tasks.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models efficiently with sparse computation to improve performance without proportional increases in computational cost.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Masked language modeling (MLM) with sparse expert routing
extraction_data.extension: Sparse expert routing mechanism replaces dense feed-forward layers with a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layer, where a router dynamically selects a subset of experts for each input token.
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Scaling the number of experts to 256, achieving a 14.7B parameter model with consistent improvements in perplexity and sample efficiency over smaller expert counts.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Improved C4 corpus (removes intra-example text duplication)
extraction_data.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, summarization, multilingual tasks, and knowledge-intensive tasks.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models efficiently with sparse computation to improve performance without proportional increases in computational cost.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Masked language modeling (MLM) with sparse expert routing
extraction_data.extension: Sparse expert routing mechanism with 256 experts for dynamic parameter activation per input token.
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: A smaller variant of the Switch Transformer architecture using the same sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) approach for efficient scaling.
extraction_data.application: Language modeling, large-scale natural language processing tasks
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models efficiently with sparse activation
extraction_data.extension: The router mechanism uses a top-1 gating strategy with auxiliary load balancing loss to ensure efficient token routing across experts.
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Intermediate-sized variant of the Switch Transformer, demonstrating the scalability of the sparse mixture-of-experts architecture with a balance between model capacity and computational efficiency.
extraction_data.extension: Uses a simplified routing algorithm with a single expert per token, reducing communication costs and improving training stability compared to prior MoE approaches.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models efficiently with sparse activation
extraction_data.application: Language modeling, multilingual machine translation, question answering, summarization
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Larger variant of the Switch Transformer, scaling the sparse mixture-of-experts architecture to hundreds of billions of parameters while maintaining training efficiency through conditional computation.
extraction_data.extension: Uses a simplified routing algorithm with a single expert per token, reducing communication costs and improving training stability compared to prior MoE approaches.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models efficiently with sparse activation
extraction_data.application: Language modeling, multilingual machine translation, question answering, summarization
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Smaller variant of the Switch Transformer using the same sparse mixture-of-experts architecture, designed for efficient training and inference with reduced computational requirements.
extraction_data.application: Language modeling, multilingual machine translation, question answering, summarization
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models efficiently with sparse activation
extraction_data.extension: Uses a simplified routing algorithm with a single expert per token, reducing communication costs and improving training stability compared to prior MoE approaches.
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
